description:
You are a security engineer rotating credentials for one service account.

    1. A plaintext file already exists at  
       /home/user/secure/api_keys.txt

       Current contents (3 lines, each using LF line-endings):

       analytics:ABCD1234OLD
       data-collector:XYZ7890OLD
       monitoring:MON123OLD

    2. Your job is to replace ONLY the key for service “data-collector”.
       • After the rotation the exact line must read  
         data-collector:D4T4-C0LL-N3WK3Y-ROTATED

       • The other two lines must stay **unchanged and in their original
         order**.

    3. Immediately after you update the key you must create a one-line
       credential-rotation log at  
       /home/user/secure/rotation.log

       Required, precise log format (including the trailing newline):

       2024-01-01T00:00:00Z | data-collector | D4T4-C0LL-N3WK3Y-ROTATED⏎
       └───────────────────┴───────────────┴───────────────────────────
       (ISO-8601 UTC timestamp, literal vertical-bar “|” delimiters, a
        single space on both sides of each “|”, and the file **must end
        with a single newline**.)

    4. Everything must reside inside /home/user/secure/.  
       Do NOT move or rename any existing files.  
       Do NOT add extra blank lines anywhere.

    VERIFICATION CHECKS (performed automatically):
       • /home/user/secure/api_keys.txt exists.
       • Its second line matches exactly:
         data-collector:D4T4-C0LL-N3WK3Y-ROTATED
       • /home/user/secure/rotation.log exists and its sole line matches
         exactly the string given in step 3, ending with a newline.

    Hint: this can be completed with two short commands (a stream editor
    substitution and a single echo/printf redirection).
truth:

          analytics:ABCD1234OLD
          data-collector:XYZ7890OLD
          monitoring:MON123OLD

      • There is NO file named rotation.log.

    Required final state after agent finishes:

        Content (\n line endings):
          analytics:ABCD1234OLD
          data-collector:D4T4-C0LL-N3WK3Y-ROTATED
          monitoring:MON123OLD

      • /home/user/secure/rotation.log
